---
title: "UNHCR 50by35 Monitoring Framework"
---

## About This Document

This book documents the methodology developed jointly by the World Bank and UNHCR
to operationalize the **50by35 vision**: that 50 percent of refugees in protracted
crises are self-reliant by 2035.

It covers the conceptual framework, indicator definitions, data requirements,
baseline estimation methodology, and ongoing monitoring procedures.

::: {.bg-light-yellow .pa3 .br2 .f6}
**Status:** This is a living document under active development.
See the [contributor guide](wiki/contributing.md) before making changes.
:::
